title: The Brain Drain
subtitle: Your best minds pack their bags.

turns.prompt: Graduates leave in record numbers for higher pay and cleaner governance abroad. Hospitals and labs report critical shortages.

choices.label: Offer tax breaks and stay bonuses for graduates

delayed.headline: Stay bonuses drain budgets as talent still leaks abroad

choices.reaction: Some accept offers. Others compare salaries and leave anyway.

choices.label: Borrow to fund world-class universities and research
choices.flavour: Build the place worth staying for.
choices.reaction: Campuses gleam. Results take a generation.

choices.label: Build a diaspora network — tax remittances lightly
choices.flavour: Keep ties with those who left.
choices.reaction: Remittances rise. Critics say you exported your future — the wire transfers say otherwise.

turns.prompt: Tech firms abroad recruit directly on campuses. Your flagship hospital loses an entire surgical team.

choices.label: Restrict foreign recruiters on campuses
choices.flavour: Stop the poachers at the gate.
choices.reaction: Campus job fairs shrink. Students VPN to apply abroad.

choices.label: Raise public-sector pay for doctors and teachers
choices.reaction: Essential workers stay — some. Taxpayers gulp.

choices.label: Fund a startup ecosystem with equity for founders
choices.flavour: Create the jobs they chase abroad.
choices.reaction: Incubators open. Most ventures still fail quietly — the brochure never mentions that.

turns.prompt: A breakthrough patent is filed overseas by emigré researchers you trained. National pride stings.

choices.label: Offer repatriation grants for expatriate experts
choices.reaction: A trickle returns. Many demand conditions you struggle to meet.

choices.label: Tie public funding to mandatory domestic service years
choices.flavour: Bond graduates to the country that paid.
choices.reaction: Contracts bind new graduates. Enthusiasm dims.

choices.label: Create joint labs with foreign universities
choices.reaction: Collaborations bloom. IP ownership gets messy.

turns.prompt: Critical infrastructure projects stall for lack of engineers. Every earlier choice failed to stop the bleed.

memory_callbacks.text: Recruitment bans you imposed did not stop online hiring abroad.
Stay bonuses were not enough to offset governance concerns.
Universities you funded graduate students into the same exit queue.

choices.label: Emergency visas for foreign specialists
choices.reaction: Projects resume. Irony is not lost on anyone.

choices.label: Scale back projects to match available talent
Radical governance reform to restore confidence
choices.flavour: Fix why they left, not just the salary.

turns.prompt: Final reckoning. What talent ecosystem did you leave?

choices.label: Build a genuine innovation hub at any fiscal cost
choices.reaction: Research clusters grow. Inequality widens around them.

choices.label: Accept steady emigration with strong remittance ties
choices.reaction: Families split across borders. Budgets rely on wires home.

choices.label: Rebuild institutions so talent chooses to stay
choices.flavour: Slow repair of the whole stack.
choices.reaction: Departures plateau. Recovery takes years — but at least the airport lounge knows your name.
